posts.author: Pradeep26
posts.text: Numbers are good. But too much of a risk in this counter. Valuations needs to be far more favourable to accomodate for the downside risks it have.

posts.author: RajAnalyst
posts.text: https://nsearchives.nseindia.com/corporate/Ranjan_11052026150413_VIL.pdf The company has come up with super results, announced a 500 Cr capex, a fund raise and a 5:1 bonus If all of it plays out well, it could be one of the top players in the cable industry in 5 years, Any views?
